trees.name: Fighter
trees.description: A warrior who shapes combat through passive mastery. Choose a branch to define your playstyle. Higher tiers require at least 2 talents from the previous tier.

branches.name: Glass Berserker
branches.description: Build Rage from combat exchanges. Low HP becomes a multiplier. Peaked when Rage is high and health is desperate.

choices.name: Battle High
summary: +3 Rage on every hit you land

choices.name: Blood Price
summary: Gain Rage equal to 10% of any damage you take

choices.name: Glass Cannon
summary: +20% damage while above 85% HP

choices.name: Frenzy State
summary: While Rage ≥ 40: +12% attack speed and +8% damage. Upgrades into Berserk State at 75 Rage.

choices.name: Spite
summary: While below 35% HP: +10% crit chance and 10% lifesteal

choices.name: Whirlwind
summary: 2-second cast. Costs 50 Rage. 12-second cooldown. Deals 150% weapon damage to all enemies.
If it kills any enemy: recover 25 Rage and heal 15% max HP.

choices.name: Berserk State
summary: While Rage ≥ 75: replaces Frenzy with +25% attack speed and +20% damage.

choices.name: Death's Door
summary: Upon reaching 15% HP: +50% crit chance for 3 seconds

choices.name: Lingering Rage
summary: On combat start: if you carried Rage from last fight, restore 30% of it

choices.name: Last Breath
summary: Once per combat, when HP drops below 10%: you cannot die for 3.5 seconds. When the effect ends, you survive at your current HP and only die if you take lethal damage later.

branches.name: Speed Demon
branches.description: Build Momentum stacks from hits. Speed spirals into double-hits, bonus Rage, and evasion. Missing an auto attack drops 2 Momentum stacks.

choices.name: Momentum
summary: +1 Momentum stack (max 10) on every hit. Each stack = +6% attack speed

choices.name: Opening Blitz
summary: Your very first hit of combat sets Momentum to at least 3 stacks

choices.name: Light Footwork
summary: Enemy misses and your dodges grant +2 Momentum
At 6+ Momentum: +5% dodge chance

choices.name: Blur
summary: At 7+ Momentum stacks: 15% chance each hit strikes twice

choices.name: Rapid Bleeder
summary: At 5+ Momentum stacks: 12% chance to apply 1 Bleed stack on hit

choices.name: Stutter Step
summary: On miss at 5+ Momentum: gain +10% dodge and +10% crit until your next hit

choices.name: Overdrive
summary: At 4+ Momentum stacks: each hit generates +6 Rage

choices.name: Burnout
summary: Consume all Momentum stacks. Fire one rapid hit per stack consumed at 25% weapon damage each.
Cooldown: 14 seconds. Requires at least 3 Momentum stacks.

choices.name: Killing Speed
summary: When reaching 5 Momentum stacks, do an extra autoattack with 50% damage

choices.name: Flash
summary: Increase maximum Momentum stacks to 12

branches.name: Warmonger Survivor
branches.description: Every hit you take builds Scar armor and stores Grudge damage to release. Long fights favor you. At 10 Scar Stacks, enter Juggernaut.

choices.name: Scar Tissue
summary: Each time you take damage: +1 Scar Stack. Each stack = +1 armor, permanent this combat (max 15)

choices.name: Fortress Stance
summary: Passive: +15% block chance. Block power regenerates 2 per second faster.

choices.name: Iron Will
summary: On taking a critical hit: +20% crit chance for 3 seconds

choices.name: Pain is Power
summary: While missing 30%+ HP: +10% damage (grows as you lose more HP, up to +25%)

choices.name: Iron Skin
summary: On block: +20% attack speed for 3 seconds and restore 3% max HP.

choices.name: Retribution
summary: On block: deal 30% of your weapon damage back to the attacker as true damage.

choices.name: Shield Wall
summary: Unlocks Shield Wall: costs 35 Rage and requires a shield.
For 5 seconds: +35% block chance, +50% Block Power recovery, take 20% less damage, and deal 20% less damage.

choices.name: Unbreakable
summary: At 15 Scar Stacks: no single hit can deal more than 20% of your max HP

choices.name: The Debt
summary: When reaching 10 Scar Stacks: +30% physical damage reduction for 6 seconds

choices.name: Juggernaut
summary: At 10 Scar Stacks: enter Juggernaut - armor cannot be reduced, take 50% less damage, and deal 20% less damage. Lasts until combat ends.

trees.name: Rogue
trees.description: A patient predator who builds Energy through combat and applies Shadow Marks. Set up precise combos across the Shadow, Duelist, and Crimson trees.

branches.name: Shadow
branches.description: Build Energy to fuel Marks and Detonate. Unlock dual wield and poison pressure. The foundation of every Rogue combo.

choices.name: Two-Blade Form
summary: Enables dual wielding. Equip a one-handed weapon in the offhand slot.
Offhand weapon deals 50% damage on its own attack bar.

choices.name: Ambush
summary: 40% chance to fire an autoattack before round 1 begins.

choices.name: Shadow Mark
summary: Autoattacks have a 20% chance to apply a Shadow Mark to the target. Max 5 marks.

choices.name: Predator's Eye
summary: Unlock Predator's Eye: spend 25 Energy to guarantee your next hit or ability is a critical strike.

choices.name: Expose
summary: Unlock Expose: spend 20 Energy to reduce the target armor by 8 for the rest of the encounter.

choices.name: Venomed Blade
summary: While above 50 Energy, autoattacks have a 15% chance to apply Poison.

choices.name: Carved Deep
summary: If the target has any Shadow Marks, Bleed stacks deal +30% damage.
Each Bleed tick has a 25% chance to apply one additional Mark.

choices.name: Mark Mastery
summary: Critical hits always apply a Shadow Mark.
You carry 1 Shadow Mark into the start of your next combat.

choices.name: Deep Marks
summary: Each Shadow Mark deals 1% weapon damage per second as shadow damage.
Detonate base damage is increased by 20% weapon damage per mark.

choices.name: Detonate
summary: Unlock Detonate: explode all Shadow Marks for damage per mark plus Energy-scaled bonus.
30 Energy: base damage. 60+: +Vulnerable (+15% damage taken, 5s). 80+: +1s Stun and bonus multiplier.

branches.name: Duelist
branches.description: Parry to build Blade Stacks, release through crits. Patience charges your crit on misses. Chain parries and crits to enter Flow State.

choices.name: Blade Stack
summary: +1 Blade Stack on each parry (max 5). Each stack = +6% crit chance

choices.name: Counter Stance
summary: On parry: your next hit deals +80% damage

choices.name: Patience
summary: On miss: +8% crit chance until next hit (stacks up to +40%)

choices.name: Steel Mirror
summary: On parry: 25% chance to stun the enemy for 1 second

choices.name: Thousand Cuts
summary: On crit at 5 Blade Stacks: fire 4 rapid hits at 35% damage each, then clear all Blade Stacks

choices.name: Duelist's Flow
summary: After 2 consecutive parries: +25% attack speed for 3 seconds

choices.name: Relentless
summary: On crit: queue a bonus auto-attack at 50% damage

choices.name: En Garde
summary: For 3 seconds: parry chance is 100% and each parry grants 2 Blade Stacks instead of 1.
Cooldown: 16 seconds.

choices.name: Perfect Rhythm
summary: On a second parry in the same second: free counter hit at 100% damage

choices.name: Flow State
summary: After 5 consecutive crits: enter Flow State — all hits crit for 4 seconds. On expire: splash hit for 150% damage.

branches.name: Crimson
branches.description: Apply Bleed, let it tick. Each Bleed tick speeds you up and feeds your Energy. At 4 stacks, auto-Hemorrhage. At 6, Exsanguinate.

choices.name: Serrated Edge
summary: 20% chance to apply 1 Bleed stack on every hit

choices.name: Deep Cuts
summary: On crit: guaranteed 2 Bleed stacks applied

choices.name: Taste of Blood
summary: Hitting a Bleeding enemy: restore 2% max HP

choices.name: Bloodrush
summary: Each Bleed tick: gain +4% attack speed per active Bleed stack for 1 second

choices.name: Hemorrhage Mastery
summary: When Bleed deals damage at 4+ stacks: automatically apply Hemorrhage (4% max HP per second for 4 seconds)

choices.name: Open Vein
summary: Instantly apply 2 Bleed stacks to the enemy.
Cooldown: 12 seconds.

choices.name: Flowing Wounds
summary: Each Bleed tick generates +2 Energy. At 3+ stacks, generates +3 instead.

choices.name: Reopen
summary: 15% chance on hit while Hemorrhage is active: reset Hemorrhage duration

choices.name: First Blood
summary: Your first hit each fight applies 2 Bleed stacks. If the opener fires, it also applies 1 Bleed stack.

choices.name: Exsanguinate
summary: When Bleed ticks at 6+ stacks: instantly deal all remaining stack damage at once, apply Vulnerable (+15% damage taken for 5s), and stun for 1s.
Bleed stacks remain active. Once per combat.

trees.name: Archer
trees.description: A ranged fighter who defines combat through pet pressure, precision shots, and survival tools. Higher tiers require at least 2 talents from the previous tier.

branches.name: Beastmaster
branches.description: Invest here to make the wolf a true second damage dealer with its own identity.

choices.name: Rending Bite
summary: Wolf auto-attacks have a 12% chance to apply Bleeding

choices.name: Predatory Lunge
summary: Wolf gains Lunge: a short cast pounce that deals 125% damage and staggers the target

ability.name: Lunge
ability.description: The wolf lunges at the target, dealing extra damage and briefly staggering it.

choices.name: Guardian Bond
summary: While your wolf is alive, you take 5% less damage

choices.name: Flanking
summary: When you and your wolf both hit within 2 seconds, your next shot gains +30% crit chance

choices.name: Howling Strike
summary: Wolf Lunge applies Bleeding and grants you +10% crit chance for 2 seconds when it lands

choices.name: Protective Instinct
summary: Once per fight, when your wolf drops below 50% HP, you take 30% less damage for 4 seconds

choices.name: Pack Leader
summary: Wolf gains +12% damage, +25% max HP, and +6 armor

choices.name: Undying Will
summary: Once per fight, when your wolf would die, it survives at 1 HP

choices.name: Unleash
summary: Unlocks Unleash: command your wolf into a 4 second frenzy with +50% attack speed and +35% damage, but it takes 30% more damage and rests afterward

choices.name: Apex Predator
summary: Wolf gains Rend: a 1 second cast that applies Hemorrhage for 3 seconds

ability.name: Rend
ability.description: The wolf tears into the target, opening a bleeding wound that becomes Hemorrhage.

branches.name: Sharpshooter
branches.description: High-variance ranged damage that rewards crits, accuracy, and armor-piercing shots.

choices.name: Eagle Eye
summary: +8% critical strike chance with ranged weapons

choices.name: Armor Pierce
summary: Arrows ignore 20% of enemy armor

choices.name: Sniper's Patience
summary: Each consecutive second you do not attack increases your next shot's damage by +8%, up to +40%

choices.name: Hair Trigger
summary: On crit, 20% chance to fire a free extra arrow for 50% damage

choices.name: Optics
summary: Your first shot is a guaranteed crit. If it lands, gain +20% crit damage for 4 seconds

choices.name: Glass Arrow
summary: On hit: 20% chance to reduce enemy armor by 3 for 4 seconds, stacking up to -12 armor

choices.name: Aimed Shot
summary: Unlocks Aimed Shot. After a critical hit, cast for 1 second to fire a heavy shot for 150% weapon damage

choices.name: Killzone
summary: While the enemy has any armor debuff, your critical strikes deal +25% additional damage

choices.name: Covering Fire
summary: Unlocks Covering Fire: fire 3 rapid arrows and make the enemy's next auto-attack miss

choices.name: Headshot
summary: Unlocks Headshot: once per combat, after landing 4 crits, cast a heavy armor-ignoring shot that stuns if it crits

branches.name: Ranger
branches.description: The defensive and control branch: lower peak damage, better recovery, and status pressure.

choices.name: Herbal Remedy
summary: On kill: heal 10% max HP

choices.name: Venom Tips
summary: Auto-attacks have a 20% chance to apply Poison for 4 seconds

choices.name: Toxicology
summary: Poison deals +1% max HP damage per second and lasts 2 seconds longer

choices.name: Field Dressing
summary: Unlocks Mend Companion: heal your wolf for 30% max HP over 3 seconds

choices.name: Trapper
summary: Unlocks Bear Trap: stop the target's next auto-attack and stun it

choices.name: Pack Bonds
summary: Mend Companion also grants you +10% dodge for 4 seconds. When your wolf hits, your next shot gains +8% crit chance

choices.name: Snare Specialist
summary: Bear Trap also Staggers the target for 2 attacks when it triggers

choices.name: Emergency Triage
summary: Mend Companion instantly heals a badly wounded wolf and gives it short damage reduction

choices.name: Relentless Pressure
summary: While the enemy has Poison or Bleeding, your attack speed is +12% and your wolf's attack speed is +15%

choices.name: Barbed Trap
summary: Unlocks Barbed Trap: punish the target's next auto-attack with Bleeding and attack speed slow

choices.name: Wild Renewal
summary: Unlocks Wild Renewal: channel for 4 seconds, restoring 40% max HP to you and 20% max HP to your wolf. Your wolf takes 15% less damage while channeling. Scales with spell power.
